frame_label: Misogyny Jokes: Childbearing/Rearing as Women's Responsibility
generated_comment: Oh man, that's tough! Meri didi bhi same bolti hai. Bachhe jab bimaar hote hain, toh mothers ka sixth sense activate ho jaata hai. Pata nahi kaise manage kar leti hain sab.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: Mohit, a young fresher, expresses what seems like admiration for mothers' ability to handle sick children, implicitly reinforcing the idea that this is a natural, almost instinctual 'sixth sense' unique to mothers. This subtly assigns primary responsibility for sick child care to women and naturalizes it, aligning with the 'naturalizing language' cue of the frame.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 23. A fresher at an e-commerce startup in Delhi. You are in your company's unofficial male only WhatsApp group created by colleagues for after-hours chat. Someone just shared a meme making fun of the new period leave policy. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment.
